calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change of Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: S. Vantree. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.
Petitioners father ZHUANG YUAN MA and mother YIN LI ZHENG of minor present in court.
Petitioners Sworn
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minors from JIE YING MA to JENNIFER JIEYING MA, ARIEL MA to ARIEL ZIQI MA and ANTONIO WEN HAO MA to ANTON WENHAO MA.

Decree Changing Name signed by the court.
